name: agents-md-management
description: Audit AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md files, then capture session learnings.

interface.shortDescription: Audit agent instructions and capture learnings
interface.longDescription: Keep AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md files current across project and user scopes. Includes a cold audit skill for cleanup and a warm capture skill for session learnings.
defaultPrompt: Audit my CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files
Update AGENTS.md with what we learned this session
Check if my agent instructions are up to date
